headline: TEL Gears Up to Report Q3 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
summary: TE Connectivity's fiscal third-quarter performance is expected to have benefited from strong order momentum, AI-driven demand, and backlog growth.

headline: Countdown to TE Connectivity (TEL) Q3 Earnings: Wall Street Forecasts for Key Metrics
summary: Beyond analysts' top-and-bottom-line estimates for TE Connectivity (TEL), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended June 2026.
